_comment: Cheffy expression poses. Data, not code -- tweak numbers here to change how Cheffy emotes, without touching components. Each pose is a partial override of REST in src/utils/cheffyRig.ts; anything omitted stays at its rest value. Dialogue nodes reference these by name via their 'expression' field.
_params: bob/shiftX (px offsets, -up), tilt (deg), squash (1=none <1 squat >1 stretch), brimDy (px, -34 tucks brim into hat), brimBend (-1 frown..+1 smile), brimLen (half-length), brimW (stroke width), lookX/lookY (gaze px), eyesDy (structural, -36 hides eyes in hat), eyeL/RScale (size), eyeL/ROpen (1 round..0 shut), lidTopL/R (upper lid drop 0..1), lidBotL/R (lower lid rise 0..1, 0.5=sleepy dome), lidAngleL/R (deg, brow tilt -- mirrored automatically so + angles read as a scowl on both eyes)
_motion: Optional per-pose 'motion': 'soft' | 'default' | 'snappy' picks the spring feel used to enter the pose.

hidden._: Plain hat icon: brim tucked up to become the hat band, eyes inside the hat.

happy._: Brim drops slightly and bends into a proper smile-mouth.

scowl._: Determined. Angled upper lids + slight frown of the brim.

_aliases: Alternate names dialogue authors may use; both sides must exist.
